title: dryopteris trichophlebia
intro: Dryopteris trichophlebia, also known as the autumn fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Dryopteris genus and is native to East Asia. The medicinal properties of Dryopteris trichophlebia lie in its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off bacteria and viruses, due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve liver function, and boost the immune system, making it a popular choice in traditional Chinese medicine. Dryopteris trichophlebia can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, with the latter two often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
